FakeE2E.$comment: E2E profile (testing.md section 4.2). The REAL Gert.Chat/Tools/Ingestion adapters run, but point at the Python mock upstreams; the host trusts the git-ignored dev JWKS that tools/smoke/tokens.py generates, validating python-minted tokens offline through the real RS256/JWKS path. NEVER a Production profile.

environmentVariables.$comment_artifacts: F3: HTML artifacts render on a SEPARATE origin. In prod this is a sandbox subdomain; in dev/CI a second Kestrel port (:5218) is a genuinely distinct origin, so the browser enforces the real cross-origin boundary.
environmentVariables.$comment_sandbox: run_python runs on the default Monty backend, pointed at the Python monty mock (tools/smoke/mocks/monty.py) on :8077 - so the real MontySandbox adapter HTTP path is exercised against a wire-level fake.
environmentVariables.$comment_chat: The picker's provider catalog: one 'echo' provider named 'Echo Server' pointed at the vLLM mock (:8000), declaring tools+vision so the tool scenarios are offered. Mirrors the zero-config synthesized default with a friendly name.
